title: SkyButtons
description: Utility mod for Hypixel Skyblock focusing on low-latency warp requests with a fancy new optional menu.
body:
![Market1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/429a6e1eadff40abd96171936ffc79055983f53a.png)

# A Note On Updates
This mods minecraft version should usually be updated in parity with [Skyblocker (Modpack)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/skyblocker-modpack), I personally play with that modpack because I have also contributed to its development.

# 📖 Short Description
SkyButtons does not replace the warp menu, its a list of all warps in the game separated by drop-down categories.
# ❓ What does the mod add?
It adds:
- One keybind, "SkyButtons -> Open Warp Menu"
- One menu

- ![menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ebc5e82c8970e516412dceb8d35aec2b18a7422.png)
# ❓ What does the menu do?
When you use the keybind "Open Warp Menu", the mod's menu will open. This allows you to scroll through all Hypixel Skyblock warps, and you can click on each one to warp to its label.
# ❓ Why do I want this?
The normal Hypixel Skyblock warp menu is just papers that you click on, which usually can be fixed by some texturepacks, however, this screen is handled by the server, and because of that, hypixel will have a significant delay when warping you.
If its executed on the client side like this mod (because the warp buttons are just shortcuts for the raw commands), it will only have to process that one warp request, making it MUCH faster.


# 📖 Notes
(1.21.4>) NEWEST VERSION: Skyblocker modpack blocks the up arrow keybind. You must change it yourself.
(1.21.1<)The default way to access the menu is up arrow.
